mapper.select: SELECT agent_id, agent_name, agent_type, agent_desc, model_id, template_id, agent_status, agent_from FROM ai_agent WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT agent_id, agent_name, agent_type, agent_desc, model_id, template_id, agent_status, agent_from FROM ai_agent WHERE agent_status = 1 AND agent_type IN ('step', 'loop', 'react') ORDER BY agent_id ASC
SELECT agent_id, agent_name, agent_type, agent_desc, model_id, template_id, agent_status, agent_from FROM ai_agent ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent (agent_id, agent_name, agent_type, agent_desc, model_id, template_id, agent_status, agent_from) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{agentName}, #{agentType}, #{agentDesc}, #{modelId}, #{templateId}, #{agentStatus}, COALESCE(#{agentFrom}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_agent SET agent_status = #{status} WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}
